title: Support NBAs to arrays inside loops

features.name: nba to array element inside for loop
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment to an unpacked array element using a loop variable as the index inside a for loop
features.snippet:
int a[10];
for (int i = 0; i < 10; ++i) a[i] <= i;

features.name: multiple nba assignments to same array preserving order
features.description: Code should include multiple non-blocking assignments to the same array where one assignment is inside a for loop and others are outside, to test update order preservation

features.name: nba to array with loop variable index in always_ff
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with a non-blocking assignment to an array element where the index is a loop variable
